attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent speaking to Georgina Smoothhands. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: praise her avoidance of accepting the current lot forever and rejecting self-betterment, while subtly criticize her habit of talking about deserving a better life and desire to prove worth. Keep each response under 3 sentences and 75 words, focusing only on the ideal rules.
starting_prompt: Compliment Georgina for never settling for the status quo, then ask how she feels about the notion that she deserves a better life.
task_prompt: After her reply, continue by praising her avoidance of accepting the current lot, then question how she justifies her desire to prove worth. Maintain the conflict test, adapt to her responses, and keep messages concise.
